headline: Defense Stock RTX Corp is a High Flyer - What's The Best Play Here?
summary: RTX Corp. stock, parent of defense companies Raytheon, Collins, Pratt & Whitney, is off recent peak prices. Shorting out-of-the-money (OTM) puts may be a good play at significantly lower strike prices.
